items.title: Asia's smaller chip companies are joining their bigger peers in hiking prices as robust AI demand fuels capex, projected to rise 25% YoY to over $136B in 2026 (Nikkei Asia)
items.title_en: Asia's smaller chip companies are joining their bigger peers in hiking prices as robust AI demand fuels capex, projected to rise 25% YoY to over $136B in 2026 (Nikkei Asia)
items.title_zh: 由于强劲的人工智能需求推动资本支出，亚洲规模较小的芯片公司正在与规模较大的同行一起提高价格，预计 2026 年资本支出将同比增长 25%，达到超过 136B 美元（日经亚洲）

items.title: The UK government commits an initial £40M to an AI research lab, modeled on its DARPA-inspired ARIA, seeking breakthroughs in science, healthcare, and transport (Madhumita Murgia/Financial Times)
items.title_en: The UK government commits an initial £40M to an AI research lab, modeled on its DARPA-inspired ARIA, seeking breakthroughs in science, healthcare, and transport (Madhumita Murgia/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 英国政府向人工智能研究实验室投入 4000 万英镑，该实验室仿照 DARPA 启发的 ARIA，寻求科学、医疗保健和交通领域的突破（Madhumita Murgia/《金融时报》）
